description: Planted near-duplicate titles in the same (file, symbol) bucket. Findings F1 and F2 have title token sets {missing, csrf, token, check} — Jaccard = 4/4 = 1.0, above the 0.8 threshold → merged. Finding F3 'Race condition in handler' has no overlapping tokens with F1/F2 → remains distinct. F2 has severity 'medium', F1 has severity 'high'; merged finding preserves 'high' description.

input_findings.title: Missing CSRF token check
input_findings.description: The POST /login endpoint is missing CSRF token validation, allowing forged requests from authenticated sessions.

input_findings.title: CSRF token check missing
input_findings.description: A CSRF token check is absent on the handleLogin function.

input_findings.title: Race condition in handler
input_findings.description: Concurrent login attempts can reach a race condition due to non-atomic read-modify-write on session state.

notes.jaccard_f1_vs_f2: tokens(F1)={missing,csrf,token,check} tokens(F2)={csrf,token,check,missing} → intersection=4 union=4 → Jaccard=1.0 ≥ 0.8 → MERGE
notes.jaccard_f1_vs_f3: tokens(F1)={missing,csrf,token,check} tokens(F3)={race,condition,handler} → intersection=0 union=7 → Jaccard=0.0 < 0.8 → DISTINCT
notes.severity_preservation: F1=high, F2=medium → merge preserves high (F1 description wins)

expected_consolidated_findings.title: Missing CSRF token check
expected_consolidated_findings.description: The POST /login endpoint is missing CSRF token validation, allowing forged requests from authenticated sessions.

expected_consolidated_findings.title: Race condition in handler
expected_consolidated_findings.description: Concurrent login attempts can reach a race condition due to non-atomic read-modify-write on session state.
